title: Set up TanStack Query v5 with Next.js App Router
summary: Full TanStack Query v5 integration for Next.js App Router — QueryClient provider, typed useQuery and useMutation hooks, server-component prefetching with dehydration, and cache invalidation patterns.
declaration: I will set up TanStack Query v5 (formerly React Query) for client-side data fetching and server state management in your Next.js App Router project. This covers the QueryClient provider, typed query hooks, prefetching from Server Components, and optimistic updates. If you only need server-side data fetching without caching, Next.js fetch() with server components may be sufficient — say so if you want to evaluate that instead.
